description: Task A: Direct success. html_scraping fetches HN homepage → COMPLETE.
Task B: Rate-limit recovery. html_scraping hits HTTP 429 → rss_fallback uses explicit rss_feed_url → COMPLETE.
Task C: Parse-error recovery. html_scraping fetches JSON content (no HTML headings/links) → empty_response → api_fallback hits jsonplaceholder → COMPLETE.
Task D: Network-error recovery. html_scraping hits ConnectError on invalid domain → network_error → cached_response reads pre-seeded Redis cache → COMPLETE.
Task E: Direct success on a different domain. html_scraping fetches example.com → COMPLETE.
